short_description: Three-seat sofa with solid walnut frame and stain-resistant linen upholstery. Deep cushions for everyday lounging comfort.
Curved lounge chair wrapped in natural linen with FSC-certified oak legs. Designed for slow afternoons and good books.
Rounded coffee table hand-finished in solid white oak. Soft chamfered edges and a low silhouette for modern living rooms.
Sculptural accent chair upholstered in textured ivory boucle. Statement piece for entryways and reading corners.
Low-profile king bed with upholstered headboard and engineered hardwood slats. No box spring required.
Two-drawer nightstand crafted from kiln-dried walnut with soft-close runners and brass-tipped legs.
Slim upholstered bench in warm camel leather. Doubles as bedroom seating or living-room overflow.
Family-size dining table built from solid white oak with a hand-rubbed matte finish. Comfortably seats six.
Steam-bent solid ash dining chair with hand-woven paper cord seat. Sold individually or in sets of four.
Petite side table with Carrara marble top and powder-coated steel base. Perfect beside sofas and chairs.
Hand-woven rattan pendant with diffused warm-glow LED. Casts beautiful organic shadows on walls and ceilings.
Adjustable arc floor lamp finished in aged brass with weighted marble base. Reach over sofas with ease.
Tall hand-thrown ceramic vase in warm terracotta tones. Sculptural on its own or styled with branches.
Hand-loomed 8x10 area rug in natural undyed wool. Subtle ribbed texture brings warmth to any room.
Six-shelf bookcase in solid walnut with brass-pin shelf supports. Tall enough to anchor a wall confidently.
